title: Spice Route - Indian Restaurant
seoTitle: Spice Route - Indian Restaurant - Free Restaurant Website Template | Multiverse
prompt: Build a premium restaurant website inspired by Spice Route - Indian Restaurant. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
SPICE ROUTE
  • Cuisine
  • Menu
  • Experience
  • Reviews

Spice Route

Journey Through Indian Flavors

From Kerala's coastal curries to Punjab's tandoori treasures, experience India's culinary heritage

Our Culinary Traditions

Tandoor Mastery

Clay oven perfection. Our tandoor reaches 900°F, imparting authentic char and smoky depth to meats and breads.

Spice Blending

Hand-ground masalas daily. Each spice blend balances heat, aromatics, and depth to perfection.

Fresh Ingredients

Sourced from trusted suppliers. Cilantro, ginger, turmeric—everything is fresh and premium quality.

Menu

Authentic recipes from every region of India

Butter Chicken

Tender chicken in creamy tomato sauce with fenugreek

Medium $18

Lamb Rogan Josh

Aromatic lamb curry with yogurt and spices

Hot $22

Palak Paneer

Cottage cheese in spinach gravy, classic and creamy

Mild $16

Tandoori Chicken

Marinated and clay-oven roasted to perfection

Medium $24

Seekh Kebab

Minced meat skewers with herbs and spices

Hot $16

Paneer Tikka

Marinated cheese cubes, tandoor-grilled

Mild $14

Naan

Traditional tandoor-baked flatbread

Plain $4

Garlic Naan

Topped with fresh garlic and cilantro

Garlic $5

Biryani Rice

Fragrant basmati with meat or vegetables

Rice $12

Chicken Biryani

Fragrant rice layered with spiced chicken

Medium $16

Lamb Biryani

Premium rice with tender, spiced lamb

Hot $18

Veg Biryani

Aromatic rice with fresh seasonal vegetables

Mild $14

Experience the Spice Route

Authentic Recipes

Generations-old recipes passed down from Indian master chefs

Premium Spices

Hand-selected from the spice markets of India

Made with Love

Every dish prepared with passion and care

Guest Stories

Rajesh Kumar

"Finally found authentic Indian food! The tandoori chicken tastes like what I eat at home in Delhi. Highly impressed."

Emma Wilson

"The spice blending is phenomenal. Each curry had perfect balance of heat and flavor. We're coming back next week!"

Marco Santos

"Best biryani outside of India. The naan is crispy and hot, the curries are aromatic. Worth every penny."

Embark on Your Spice Journey

Reserve your table and explore the flavors of India

Book Your Table

Spice Route

Authentic Indian cuisine bringing the flavors of India to your table.

Navigation

  • Cuisine
  • Menu
  • Reviews

Contact

  • +1 (555) 789-0123
  • hello@spiceroute.com
  • 456 Spice Lane, Flavor City

Hours

  • Tue-Thu: 5PM-10PM
  • Fri-Sat: 5PM-11PM
  • Sun: 5PM-9PM
  • Monday: Closed
